zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomasina Heydon於1527年出生在英國可瓦爾亞可布斯托福時，她的父親John Heydon23歲，母親Jane Tovey20歲。她於1540年與Sir John Henry Rogers結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1596年10月21日在英國可瓦爾聖 布雷沃德享年69歲，埋葬在英國可瓦爾聖 布雷沃德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomasina Heydon于1527年出生在英国可瓦爾亞可布斯托福时，她的父亲John Heydon23岁，母亲Jane Tovey20岁。她于1540年与Sir John Henry Rogers结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1596年10月21日在英国可瓦爾聖 布雷沃德享年69岁，埋葬在英国可瓦爾聖 布雷沃德。

nameMeanings.name: Heydon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Hayden
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hÉideáin ‘descendant of Éideán’ and Ó hÉidín ‘descendant of Éidín’, personal names apparently from a diminutive of éideadh ‘clothes, armor’. There was also a Norman family bearing the English name (see 2 below), living in County Wexford. Alternative spellings include Hadden .

English: habitational name from any of various places called Haydon (Dorset, Wiltshire, Somerset, Gloucestershire), Heydon (Cambridgeshire, Norfolk), or Hayden (Gloucestershire, Oxfordshire). Most of the placenames derive from Old English hēg ‘hay’ or (ge)hæg ‘fence, enclosure’ + dūn ‘hill’, though the Cambridgeshire placename has Old English denu ‘valley’ as the final element.

nameMeanings.name: Thomasina
meanings: A female name derived from Thomas

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Thomasina Heydon was born in 1527, in Jacobstow, Cornwall, England, her father, John Heydon, was 23 and her mother, Jane Tovey, was 20. She married Sir John Henry Rogers in 1540. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 8 daughters. She died on 21 October 1596, in St Breward, Cornwall, England, at the age of 69, and was buried in St Breward, Cornwall, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomasina Heydon est née en 1527, à Jacobstow, Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, John Heydon, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Jane Tovey, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Henry Rogers en 1540. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée le 21 octobre 1596, à St Breward, Cornouailles, Angleterre, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterrée à St Breward, Cornouailles, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomasina Heydon 1527 in Jacobstow, Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Heydon 23 und ihre Mutter Jane Tovey 20. Sie hat 1540 Sir John Henry Rogers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 10 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb am 21. Oktober 1596 im Alter von 69 Jahren in St Breward, Cornwall, England und wurde in St Breward, Cornwall, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomasina Heydon è nata il nel 1527 nel Jacobstow, Cornwall, England, sua padre, John Heydon, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Jane Tovey, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Henry Rogers nel 1540. Erano genitori di almeno 10 figli e 8 figlie. Morì il 21 ottobre 1596, nel St Breward, Cornwall, England, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolta a St Breward, Cornwall, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomasina Heydonが1527年にイギリスコルンワルジャコブストウで生まれた時，父John Heydonは23歳，母Jane Toveyは20歳であった。1540年にSir John Henry Rogersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1596年10月21日にイギリスコルンワルスト ブレワードで69歳で死去し，イギリスコルンワルスト ブレワードにて埋葬された。

ko.London, London, England: 미국 미시간 주 먼로 런던 타운시프 런던
ko.Saint Columb Major, Cornwall, England: 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 세인트 콜럼 마조르
ko.St Columb Major, Cornwall, England: 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 스트 콜럼 마조르
ko.lifeSummary: Thomasina Heydon(이)가 1527년 영국 코른월 재컵스타우에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Heydon(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane Tovey(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1540년 Sir John Henry Rogers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1596년 10월 21일 영국 코른월 스트 브레워드에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 코른월 스트 브레워드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomasina Heydon nasceu em 1527, em Jacobstow, Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Heydon, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Jane Tovey, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Henry Rogers em 1540. Eles tiveram pelo menos 10 filhos e 8 filhas. Ela faleceu em 21 de outubro de 1596, em St Breward, Cornwall, Inglaterra, com 69 anos, e foi sepultada em St Breward, Cornwall, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomasina Heydon родилась в 1527 г. в местности джакобстоу, корнвалл, Англия, её отцу по имени John Heydon было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Jane Tovey, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Henry Rogers в 1540 г. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Она умерла 21 октября 1596 г. в местности ст брюард, корнвалл, Англия в возрасте 69 лет и была похоронена в местности ст брюард, корнвалл, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomasina Heydon nació en 1527, en Jacobstow, Cornwall, Inglaterra, su papá, John Heydon, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Jane Tovey, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Sir John Henry Rogers en 1540. Fueron padres de por lo menos 10 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió el 21 de octubre de 1596, en St Breward, Cornwall, Inglaterra, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultada en St Breward, Cornwall, Inglaterra.
